series_metadata.series_description: All records concerning federal grants to OBR which document the expenditure and use of federal monies. Also, requests for proposals, proposals, evaluation materials, reports and other related materials. This schedule only covers federal grant programs that do not have an individual record retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from date of submission of final report awarding federal agency or as otherwise agreed between OBR and awarding agency, whichever is longer.In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved. ; Paper: Paper records may be scanned and destroyed. from date of submission of final report awarding federal agency or as otherwise agreed between OBR and awarding agency, whichever is longer.In event of an open audit on these records at end of retention period, audit is complete and discrepancies resolved
